name: Bendigo And Adelaide Bank Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at A$10.4777. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$10.4777, stop A$9.8505, target A$10.8500. Risk/reward is 0.59:1.
